# Nexus Lab Systems
 
> Nexus Lab Systems designs, builds, and maintains fast, premium websites and SEO for local service businesses — dentists and healthcare providers, tradespeople, and professional services. Everything is handled start to finish by one person: the same individual who pitches the work builds it and supports it, with no agency handoffs, junior teams, or ticket queues.
 
Nexus Lab Systems is a solo web studio founded by Mohammad Jawad Samadi, a practising GDC-registered dental clinician who also builds production software. This dual background means websites are built by someone who understands both the technical craft and how local-trust businesses actually win customers online. The studio competes on speed, care, and premium design quality rather than scale.
 
## What we do
 
- **Website design & development**: Fast, premium, conversion-focused websites built for local service businesses. Designed to build trust and turn visitors into customers.
- **SEO & local SEO**: Technical, on-page, and local search optimisation — Google Business Profile, maps, and content — to get found by nearby customers.
- **Website care plans & maintenance**: Monthly plans covering updates, security, backups, hosting, and ongoing tweaks so sites stay fast, secure, and current.
 
## Who we serve
 
- **Dental & healthcare**: Practices and providers; built by a practising clinician who knows how patients choose.
- **Professional services**: Accountants, solicitors, consultants, and firms that win clients on trust.
- **Trades & local business**: Tradespeople and local businesses that need to be found by nearby customers and convert searches into booked jobs.
 
## Key pages
 
- [Home](https://www.nexuslabsystems.com): Overview and primary entry point.

- [SEO & Local SEO](https://www.nexuslabsystems.com/services/seo)

- [Industries](https://www.nexuslabsystems.com/industries): Verticals served.
- [Work & Case Studies](https://www.nexuslabsystems.com/work): Before-and-after teardowns and results.
- [Pricing](https://www.nexuslabsystems.com/pricing): One-off build packages plus monthly care plans.
- [About](https://www.nexuslabsystems.com/about): The founder story and how the studio works.
- [Contact](https://www.nexuslabsystems.com/contact): Book a free website teardown.
- [Blog](https://www.nexuslabsystems.com/blog): Guides on web design and SEO for local businesses.
 
## How to work with us
 
The primary next step for any prospective client is to book a free website teardown — a no-commitment review of their current site with specific, actionable feedback. Requests are made via the contact page.
 
## Key facts
 
- **Founder**: Mohammad Jawad Samadi.
- **Model**: Solo studio — one person designs, builds, and maintains each site end to end.
- **Positioning**: Premium, fast, conversion-focused work for local-trust businesses; low overhead versus traditional agencies.
- **Pricing structure**: One-off website build packages, plus optional monthly website care/maintenance subscriptions.
- **Contact**: contact@nexuslabsystems.com
